name: aggregator: within a file, rules in the output preserve the declaration order from the source yaml
command:
mkdir -p tree/google && printf 'source:
  id: g
  authoritative_publisher: G
  authoritative_url: https://g.com
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-04T00:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:S
  fetch_frequency: daily
  fragility_tier: low
  license_note: MIT
rules:
  - {id: g-z-001, name: z, description: x, detector: x, type: problem, fixable: null, has_suggestions: false, deprecated: false, replaced_by: [], docs_url: https://x.com, requires_type_checking: false, recommended: true, options_schema: {}, messages: {default: x}, severity: P1, version: 1.0.0, semver: 1.0.0, rule_state: warn-only, provenance: [{source: x, class: published-standard, section_id: x, url: https://x.com, fetched_at: 2026-05-04T00:00:00Z, content_hash: sha256:S}]}
  - {id: g-a-001, name: a, description: x, detector: x, type: problem, fixable: null, has_suggestions: false, deprecated: false, replaced_by: [], docs_url: https://x.com, requires_type_checking: false, recommended: true, options_schema: {}, messages: {default: x}, severity: P1, version: 1.0.0, semver: 1.0.0, rule_state: warn-only, provenance: [{source: x, class: published-standard, section_id: x, url: https://x.com, fetched_at: 2026-05-04T00:00:00Z, content_hash: sha256:S}]}
recommended_set: [g-z-001, g-a-001]
all_set: [g-z-001, g-a-001]
' > tree/google/x.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/aggregator.sh" --root "$PWD/tree" --format json 2>out.json && node -e 'const r=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("out.json","utf8"));const order=r.rules.map(x=>x.id);if(order[0]==="g-z-001"&&order[1]==="g-a-001"){process.stderr.write("ok
")}else{process.stderr.write("FAIL: "+order+"
");process.exit(1)}'
